description: Create a residential plumbing schematic for a 2-bathroom house based on the specifications in ~/Desktop/plumbing_specs.txt using draw.io Desktop. The schematic must include labeled shapes for all fixtures listed in the spec (City Main, Meter, Water Heater, Sinks, Toilets, Showers, etc.) connected by lines representing pipes. Use blue lines for cold water supply and red lines for hot water supply. Adhere to plumbing logic where toilets receive only cold water, while sinks, showers, and washing machines receive both hot and cold, and the water heater takes cold in and sends hot out. Save the editable diagram as ~/Desktop/plumbing_schematic.drawio and export a PNG image to ~/Desktop/plumbing_schematic.png.
